mapper.select: SELECT * FROM diary WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%')
SELECT * FROM diary WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary(title, content, user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE diary SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, user_id = #{userId}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
